title: notanthera orbicularis
intro: Notanthera orbicularis is a plant species that belongs to the Apocynaceae family, commonly known as the dogbane or oleander family, and is native to South America. The medicinal properties of Notanthera orbicularis include its ability to exhibit antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to support cardiovascular health, reduce inflammation, and improve cognitive function, although further research is necessary to confirm these effects. Notanthera orbicularis can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be prepared by steeping the plant's leaves and flowers in hot water or a solvent like ethanol.
